title: Chris Kennedy
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Chris Kennedy
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_titles: Associate Dean, College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

biography: Born and raised in the Bay Area, Dr. Kennedy completed his bachelor's degree at UC Berkeley in 1997, and then his doctorate at the University of Michigan in 2004. He worked for two years at Edinboro University of Pennsylvania before coming to Christopher Newport University in 2006. He has served as the chair of the department since 2013.
education_entries: Ph D in Mathematics, University of Michigan
MA in Mathematics, University of Michigan
BA in Mathematics, University of California, Berkeley
research_interests: My research interests lie in infinite dimensional non-associative algebra, specifically Lie algebras of deep matrix and C* algebras.
teaching_interests: My main teaching interests are in cryptography, error correcting codes, and abstract algebra. Regardless, I am happy to teach anywhere across the math curriculum.

Presentations: Christopher Kennedy, Innovation in Academic Leadership for Department Chairs, Washington, DC. (2018)
